titleStmt.title: SII 24.548: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 548. (A.R. No. 108 of 1937-38.) V PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL OF THE GARUḌA-MAṆḌAPA.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land in the village Kūttappāra in Kōnāḍu to the east of Tiruchināpaḷḷi by Basavappa-Nāyuḍu, son of Jaṅgama-Nāyuḍu of Kāśyapa gōtra for offerings and worship to the god on the 8th day of the festival instituted by Chokkanātha-Nāyaka when the god was taken in procession to Vasanta vilāsa-maṇḍapa in Nāchchiyār-tōppu. The record is dated Śaka 1593 Virōdhikṛit, Māgha, ba. 3, Monday, Uttira corresponding regularly to A.D. 1672 February 5, Monday ·95; ·60.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁ
bulu 1593 Agunēṭi virōdhikṛtu saṁvatsaramā
gha ba 3 Iṁduvāsaraṁ vuttara nakṣatraṁ kūḍina yi
śubhadinamaṁdu dakṣīṇapugaṭṭu pāṁḍikulā(śi)
śanivāḷanāḍu tiruvaraṁgaṁ tirupati perumā
ślu śrīraṁganāyakula śrībhaṁḍārānku kāśya
pa gōtraṁ jaṁggamanā (na) yani putruṁḍu basavāppanā
yaḍuddaṁḍaṁ samarpiṁcci Iccina pūliveṭṭu śilāśā
sanakramaṁrāyagōpuraprakāraṁniki tūrupunā
Ādikēśava perumāḷu kōvilaku paḍamara
yīmadhyavunna nācāramma tōpulō nā vubhayaṁ vasa
ṁta vilāsamaṁṭapamaṁdu cokkanāthanāyanayyavāri
vubhayamaina mahōtpavamaṁdu yanimidō di
naṁnāḍu vēṁccēśēṭaṁduku nidhi dīpānakunnu
maṁgaḷahāratikinnicce camaru paḷlu 3 ki r 3 yā
lakulu palālu 2 r Ö ß Āragiṁpunu bonaṁtaḷigelu 12 ki taḷigelu 10
kṣēmaṁ taḷigelu 20 vubhayaṁ taḷigelu 12 ki taḷige 1
ki biyyaṁcē camarussa 3Ø lēkhaga 4ß0 borugulu
2regāß3 dōśelu 300 kīga3 Ø vaḍalu 300 kī ga
4 2 Atirasālu 300 kīga 8 4 pesarugiṁja gō
nalu 20kī ga 20kī 2 pānakaṁ gūnalu 21kī ga ceruppa
1 pāvaḍaku taḷigelu 80 biyyaṁ 6 2ki ga
1 ce camarupaślu 2 ki 2 pesalakrayaṁ ga ß1
kūragāya Araṭikāyabu 00ki 4 pa
nava kāyalu 5ki 2 vaṁkāyaka 1 ki r
kāṁkarakāya ka 1ki r 2� dōsakāyalu
20ki r 1 yiṁduku vuppu miriyaṁ ciṁtta
paṁḍu palasaṁbbāraṁ r 4 ce camarupaḷlu 1ßr (ri)
1 teṁkāyalu gaß 0 Areṁṭipaṁḍlu 500ki
ga ß0 nārikēśāmṛtālu 200 1 cerukulu
200 ki gaß 1 panasapaṁḍlu 5ki r 2 gaṁddhaṁppiślu
12ki r 3 bhāgāla palālu 40kini Ākulu 500
ki r 4 sugaṁdhaṁ tirumāle r 2 pāvaḍa parivaṁṭṭaṁ
tirumaṁgānir ga ß0 ma paṁ
deliveṁyyanu Addhe gaßr śrībaṁḍārānama
ddi koppera mōdalaina ceruvulu teccē Addeki 1 sa
dīpaṭu ki0 ce camaru paḷlu 22ki ga2r 2 ṭekke
lu dīviṭu yette Adde ga peṭa kovula maṁdukra
yaṁ ga ß0 cillara daḷavāḍānaku ga 1Ö0 Aṁttuga
23ki cirutanāpalleku tūrppa kōnāṭuva
ṇitamulō kkūttappāra grāmāna kiḷināṭu
kāluva pāraṭaṁlō dēvadānaṁ maḷlalō padnā
lugu cētulanēla cērccināraṁgganaka yī prakāraṁ
svāmi śrīraṁgganāyakulavāri śrībhaṁḍārā
naku basavappa yiccina poliveṭu śilāśāsanamu vrā
sinadi śrīraṁggasthalaṁ saṁprati rāmappa brāsinadi
yiṁdduku yajamānaśaṁ kaliginadi yī sthalaṁ A
rccakanaṁ perumāśaiyya Anubhaviṁccēdi je
yimastu vinikoḍa guruvappa Ācāribrālu ve di
Digital edition of SII 24.548 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
